blocks.text: Åberg leads THE PLAYERS — Arsenal's title test begins at home to Everton
After Leverkusen held Arsenal to a 1-1 draw on Wednesday, today's home game against Everton is non-negotiable. Seven points clear of City — but the Blues play at West Ham tonight too.
🚴 Mon 12:40 — Tirreno-Adriatico opens, Leknessund & Wærenskjold lead Norwegian charge across Italy
